title: Duck Bills, craftable money
description: Money that you make in survival
body:
Craftable Money Mod – Description

Have you ever wanted to have money in Minecraft that you could actually craft and use? Well now you can! I made this mod because I couldn't find any that let you craft your own currency. With this mod, you can create your very own stack of cash – from small change to serious stacks.

What’s in the Mod (So Far):
5 Cents 10 Cents 1 Dollar 2 Dollars 10 Dollars 20 Dollars 50 Dollars 100 Dollars 500 Dollars
All of these denominations are fully craftable using simple recipes – no commands or cheating required. Whether you want to simulate an economy with your friends or just stack your virtual wallet, this mod gives you the tools to do it.

Wallet Item:
You’ll also get access to a wallet! Use it to store all your crafted money in one place, so your inventory doesn’t get cluttered. It's super useful for roleplay, trading, or just feeling rich in your Minecraft world.

 Why I Made This:
I made this mod because no one else seemed to have done it — and I thought, why not? It’s simple, fun, and opens up a bunch of gameplay possibilities. Right now, you can craft money ranging from $0.05 all the way to $500... but who knows? Maybe one day, you’ll be able to craft $15,000,000,000. 👀
